title: Datadog Tracer Uninstall Flow
interaction_flow: CLI → main(): php datadog-setup.php --uninstall --php-bin <binary>
main() → parse_validate_user_options(): returns [cmd, opts]
main(): detects OPT_UNINSTALL=true in $options
main() → uninstall($options)
uninstall() → require_binaries_or_exit($options): returns [command => fullPath] map
[if OPT_PHP_BIN empty] require_binaries_or_exit() → search_php_binaries(): scan standard paths for PHP binaries
[if OPT_PHP_BIN empty] require_binaries_or_exit() → pick_binaries_interactive($options, $binaries): prompt user
[if OPT_PHP_BIN='all'] require_binaries_or_exit() → search_php_binaries(): all non-shebang binaries
[if OPT_PHP_BIN=<path>] require_binaries_or_exit() → resolve_command_full_path($command): resolve binary path
[if no binaries found] require_binaries_or_exit() → print_error_and_exit('At least one binary must be specified')
uninstall(): [foreach binary] → ini_values($fullPath): returns phpProperties (extension_dir, INI_SCANDIR, INI_MAIN)
uninstall(): compute extensionDestinations = [ddtrace.so, datadog-profiling.so, ddappsec.so] under extension_dir
uninstall(): [if INI_SCANDIR set] build iniFilePaths = [INI_SCANDIR/98-ddtrace.ini]
uninstall(): [if Debian-based: INI_SCANDIR contains /cli/conf.d] also add apache2/conf.d/98-ddtrace.ini
uninstall(): [if no INI_SCANDIR and no INI_MAIN] → print_error_and_exit('no scan directory and no configuration file')
uninstall(): [if no INI_SCANDIR but INI_MAIN] iniFilePaths = [INI_MAIN]
uninstall(): [foreach iniFilePath] resolve symlink via readlink() if is_link()
uninstall(): [foreach iniFilePath, if file_exists] → modify_ini_file($iniFilePath, $callback)
modify_ini_file() → Filesystem: file_get_contents($iniFilePath)
modify_ini_file(): apply $callback — regex comment-out extension= lines (prepend '; ')
[if isDatadogIni] comment ALL extension= and zend_extension= lines
[if not isDatadogIni] comment only ddtrace/datadog-profiling/ddappsec extension= lines
modify_ini_file() → Filesystem: file_put_contents($iniFilePath, $newContent) if content changed
[on write failure] modify_ini_file() → print_error_and_exit('Cannot change the settings of the INI file')
uninstall(): [foreach extensionDestination] → Filesystem: unlink($extensionDestination) — remove .so/.dll
[on unlink failure] → print_warning('Error while removing ...')
uninstall(): echo success or 'completed with warnings' per binary

key_functions.main: Entry point; calls parse_validate_user_options(), routes to uninstall() or install() based on OPT_UNINSTALL flag
key_functions.uninstall($options): Core uninstall loop per PHP binary: reads INI paths, comments out extensions, deletes .so files
key_functions.require_binaries_or_exit($options): Returns [command=>fullPath] map; interactive or from OPT_PHP_BIN list; exits on empty result
key_functions.ini_values($binary): Runs 'php -i' on binary; parses extension_dir, INI_SCANDIR ('Scan this dir for additional .ini files'), INI_MAIN ('Loaded Configuration File')
key_functions.find_all_ini_files($phpProperties): Scans INI_SCANDIR, derives SAPI-specific paths (apache2/fpm) for Debian; prioritizes 98-ddtrace.ini; used by config commands (not uninstall directly)
key_functions.modify_ini_file($path, $callback): Read→transform→write INI file; callback uses regex preg_replace to comment extension= lines

ini_modification_logic.own_ini_file (98-ddtrace.ini): Comment ALL extension= and zend_extension= lines via regex: prepend '; ' to line
ini_modification_logic.file_preserved: INI file is never deleted — only modified to comment out entries (preserves custom settings)

debian_sapi_handling: If INI_SCANDIR contains '/cli/conf.d', also target '/apache2/conf.d/98-ddtrace.ini' for SAPI-split distributions
error_paths: No PHP binary found or specified → print_error_and_exit
No INI_SCANDIR and no INI_MAIN → print_error_and_exit
important_notes: Uninstall comments out (does not delete) INI entries to preserve custom user settings. Extension .so files ARE deleted. The flow is binary-centric: all steps repeat per PHP binary. OPT_EXTENSION_DIR overrides detected extension_dir.
source_files_analyzed: datadog-setup.php (lines 53-78 main, 963-1041 uninstall, 1050-1076 require_binaries_or_exit, 825-865 find_all_ini_files, 1931-1941 modify_ini_file, 1652+ ini_values, 1-51 constants)
